channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505MS Headless 5 String Bass Pacific Blue Burst Flat B-Stock — $1,519
item.description:
$1,519 · B-Stock · Studio Gears

Ibanez EHB1505MS Headless 5-String Bass Pacific Blue Burst Flat B-Stock

The EHB1505MS delivers exceptional balance and ergonomic comfort through its headless design and multi-scale construction, making it equally at home seated or standing for extended sessions. Its chambered African mahogany body with poplar burl top feels noticeably lighter than conventional basses while maintaining the resonant warmth and sustain that working bassists depend on. This B-Stock unit shows only light cosmetic dents on the back edge—no impact on playability or performance.

Playability & Construction

The multi-scale design spans 35" to 33" (889mm to 838mm), providing ideal string tension and even tone response across all five strings. A 9-piece graphite-reinforced panga panga and walnut neck ensures rock-solid stability, while the bound panga panga fingerboard features 24 stainless steel fanned frets with offset abalone dot inlays and luminescent side dots for clear visibility in any lighting condition.

Tone & Electronics

A pair of Nordstrand Custom Big Split passive pickups deliver articulate, full-range tone with hum-canceling design, while the Vari-Mid 3-Band EQ with EQ bypass allows you to shape your sound from transparent and natural to sculpted and modern. The treble pot functions as a passive tone control when the EQ is bypassed, giving you immediate access to classic passive bass response.

Key Features
  • Chambered poplar burl top on selected lightweight African mahogany body
  • Chambered double cutaway body with ergonomic slanted back design
  • 9-piece graphite-reinforced roasted panga panga and walnut neck
  • Bound panga panga fingerboard with 24 stainless steel fanned frets and offset abalone dot position markers
  • Luminescent side dots for stage visibility
  • Multi-scale design: 889mm (35") to 838mm (33") scale lengths
  • 45mm nut width with 500mmR radius
  • Pair of Nordstrand Custom Big Split passive pickups
  • Vari-Mid 3-Band EQ with EQ bypass switch and passive treble control
  • MR5HS bridge with 18mm string spacing and ±1.5mm adjustability
  • Schaller S-Lock strap locks and Neutrik locking jack
  • Factory strung with D'Addario EXL170-5SL (.045–.130) in 1G–5B tuning; includes detachable finger ramp and Ibanez gig bag

The EHB1505MS represents a complete modern bass platform—combining ergonomic innovation, tonal versatility, and professional-grade hardware in a visually striking package that performs at the highest level.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections on the finish typical of B-Stock inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. A premium Ibanez headless 5-string instrument offered at a significant B-Stock discount while maintaining full manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: Ibanez BTB605 5 String Bass Transparent Gray Flat B-Stock — $699
item.description:
$699 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Ibanez BTB605 5-String Bass — Transparent Gray, B-Stock

The BTB605 delivers a balanced, ergonomic platform for five-string playing with its neck-through construction and tapered body wings. The 35-inch scale and carefully graduated neck dimensions provide comfortable reach and response across the fingerboard without sacrificing articulation or sustain. This B-stock unit offers the same professional-grade specifications as new stock at a reduced price point.

Playability & Build

The 5-piece Maple/Jatoba neck-through with Okoume wings creates a rigid, consistent platform for tone transfer and tuning stability. Neck dimensions are precisely profiled—47mm at the nut, 76mm at the 24th fret—with a 400mm radius that encourages clean technique across all strings and positions.

Tone & Electronics

Two Ibanez α1 humbucking pickups paired with Ibanez Custom Electronics provide comprehensive tonal control: individual volume for each pickup, master tone, and a 3-band EQ (bass, mid, treble) with a 3-way mid frequency switch (250Hz, 450Hz, 700Hz) allow surgical shaping of attack and character across musical styles. The MR5 bridge with 19mm string spacing ensures consistent response and clean separation between strings.

Key Features
  • 5-piece Maple/Jatoba neck-through body construction
  • Okoume wings with transparent gray finish
  • 35-inch scale length (889mm)
  • Rosewood fingerboard with 24 medium nickel silver frets plus zero fret
  • White dot position markers and white side dots
  • Two Ibanez α1 humbucking pickups
  • Individual volume controls, master tone, 3-band active EQ
  • 3-way mid frequency switch (250Hz, 450Hz, 700Hz)
  • MR5 bridge with 19mm string spacing
  • Cosmo black hardware
  • Neck profile: 47mm nut, 76mm at 24th fret, 400mm radius
  • Neck thickness: 20mm at 1st fret, 22mm at 12th fret

This BTB605 combines luthier-grade construction with professional-level electronics in a five-string platform built for consistency and long-term reliability.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Sub 5 active 2006 - Solido — $1,488.65
item.description:
$1,488.65 · Excellent · Juan Diego

Musicman sub 5 electrónica activa, fabricado en USA, San Obispo,California 2006.Perfecto estado,ajustado y revisado por luthier.

item.title: G&L L-2000 2019 - Tobacco Burst — $1,699
item.description:
$1,699 · Excellent · The Bass Shop

Product details:

This recently acquired L-2000 is in pristine condition and has seen very little playing time. Now that G&L is no longer in business, values of their U.S. built basses are kind of all over the map, this one is right in the middle and a great deal.

WEIGHT:  8 lbs. 13 ozs.    

SERIAL #:  CLF1903033  

DATE:  2019

NUT WIDTH:  1 1/2" 

COLOR:  Tobacco Burst

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Swamp Ash/ Maple/ Rosewood Fingerboard

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  G&L Humbucker/ G&L 9V Active Preamp with Vol. Bass, Treble, Pickup Select Switch, Series-Parallel Switch, 3 way Passive-Active-Active w/ Treble Switch

CONDITION:  Excellent  

CASE:  Gig Bag

item.title: Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3, Satin Black, Amaranth Fingerboard — $384.99
item.description:
$384.99 · Mint · Instrumentpro Inc

4-string Electric Bass with Poplar Body
2 Humbucking Pickups - Satin Black
Amaranth Fingerboard
Maple Neck

item.title: Ibanez - SR5A250 USA 250th Anniversary - Premium 5-String Bass Guitar - w/ Gigbag — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Manchester Music Mill

Ibanez - SR5A250  USA 250th Anniversary - Premium 5-String Bass Guitar - w/ Gigbag

The Ibanez SR5A250 was created to celebrate America's 250th anniversary, combining eye-catching patriotic styling with the premium craftsmanship the SR Series is known for. Finished with bold red, white, and blue paint splatters across its African mahogany body and headstock, this limited-edition 5-string bass stands out on any stage while delivering exceptional comfort and playability.

A 5-piece panga panga and purpleheart neck, reinforced with KTS titanium rods, provides outstanding stability and smooth performance. The bound panga panga fingerboard complements the instrument's refined feel, while a pair of Nordstrand Big Break pickups produce a powerful, articulate voice with impressive sustain and punch. High-quality hardware, including Gotoh tuners and the MR5S bridge, ensures dependable tuning and resonance.

Rounding out the package is Ibanez's Custom Electronics 3-band EQ, offering extensive tonal shaping options for players who demand versatility. Whether you're a collector, a performing musician, or both, the SR5A250 is a distinctive anniversary model that delivers premium tone, playability, and visual appeal.

Photos represent an example of the guitar you will receive.

Specifications:

  • Model: SR5A250
  • Number of Strings: 4
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Body Type: Solidbody
  • Body Shape: Doublecut
  • Body Material: African Mahogany
  • Color: 250th USA Anniversary
  • Body Finish: Satin Polyurethane
  • Neck Material: 5-piece Panga/Purpleheart
  • Neck Finish: Oil
  • Neck Shape: Atlas S
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-on
  • Radius: 12"
  • Fingerboard Material: Panga
  • Fingerboard Inlay: Blocks
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Fret Type: Medium
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Scale Length Type: Standard-scale
  • Nut Width: 1.77"
  • Nut Material: Graph Tech Black Tusq XL
  • Bridge/Tailpiece: Ibanez MR5S
  • Hardware Finish: Black
  • Tuners: Gotoh Machine Heads
  • Neck Pickup: Nordstrand Big Break Split-coil
  • Bridge Pickup: Nordstrand Big Break Split-coil
  • Controls: 1 x Volume, 1 x Balancer, 3-band EQ
  • Switching: EQ Bypass Switch, 3-way Mid Frequency Swtich
  • Strings: .045-.130
  • Case/Gig Bag: Gig Bag
  • Manufacturer Part Number: SR5A250

item.title: Mint Squier Affinity PJ Bass with hardshell case — $330
item.description:
$330 · Excellent · Moonlit Halls Studios

Up for sale is my Squier Precision PJ Bass in mint condition. Price includes a nice Gator hardshell case. Only used in an air conditioned, smoke free recording studio. Cleaned after each recording session, as new. Strung with Rotosound 66.

These MIC Squiers are extremely well made at this price point - I was astounded by the low action and the overall feel/finish of the guitar. I bought it to record an album - I needed that punchy passive PJ tone and it did not disappoint. Great tone and exceptional playability for the price. This bass was very loved and will make you very happy. I'm downsizing my recording setup a little bit due to getting an active bass, so it's up for grabs!

Sound demo in the link - DI into GK808 amp sim

Feel free to make me a reasonable offer.

item.title: Conklin Groove Tools GT7 7 string Bass Guitar — $699
item.description:
$699 · Good · Mark's Guitar Lounge

Conklin 7 string bass. In good condition, a couple of finish cracks by the controls (see pics), but otherwise in good condition. Bartolini pickups with active electronics (requires a 9volt battery). 34 inch scale length. Everything in good working order. Good sounding bass. I bought this used for a project that didn't last. Comes with a hardshell coffin case (not original).

Sale to the lower 48 of USA only. Will ship insured. Payment expected at time of purchase. Please ask all questions prior to purchase.

item.title: Alvarez RB30C Acoustic Bass — $399
item.description:
$399 · Excellent · House of Musical Traditions

Alvarez RB30C acoustic bass in excellent condition. 

s/n F201100322

Ca. 2000s, this acoustic electric bass can be plugged in and sounds great both ways. 

Has a truss rod!

Specs: 

  • Solid sitka spruce top
  • Laminate rosewood back and sides
  • Mahogany neck
  • Nut width: 1.6"
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Total length: 49"
  • Weight: 5.5 lbs
  • Hardshell case included

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass Olympic White w/ Deluxe Case — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Mint · Mountain Music

Fender American Professional II Precision Bass Olympic White w/ Deluxe Case

Condition: Mint

The American Professional II Precision Bass® draws from more than sixty years of innovation, inspiration and evolution to meet the demands of today's working player.

The '63 P Bass profile neck now sports smooth rolled fingerboard edges, a "Super-Natural" satin finish and a newly sculpted neck heel for a supremely comfortable feel and easy access to the upper register. The new V-Mod II Precision Bass split-coil pickup is more articulate than ever while delivering the punch and growl the P Bass® is known for.

The American Pro II Precision Bass delivers instant familiarity and sonic versatility you'll feel and hear right away, with broad ranging improvements that add up to nothing less than a new standard for professional instruments.

Features
  • Single V-Mod II split-coil Precision Bass pickup
  • '63 P Bass neck profile
  • Bone nut; 20 narrow-tall frets for familiar playing feel
  • HiMass™ Vintage bridge for increased sustain
  • Tapered-shaft tuning machines; Posiflex™ graphite rods for neck reinforcement
  • Includes Deluxe Molded hardshell case
Neck Material Maple Neck Finish “Super-Natural” Satin Urethane Finish on Back of Neck with Gloss Urethane Headstock Face Neck Shape 1963 "C" Neck Construction 4-Bolt Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm) Fingerboard Material Rosewood Position Inlays White Dot Side Dots White Number of Frets 20 Truss Rod Posiflex™ Graphite Neck Support Rods String Nut Bone Nut Width 1.625" (41.3 mm) Nut Material Bone Fret Size Narrow Tall Scale Length 34" (864 mm) Body Alder Body Finish Gloss Urethane Body Shape Precision Bass® Body Style Solid Body Body Material Alder Bridge 4-Saddle HiMass™ Vintage (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) Pickguard 4-Ply Tortoiseshell Pickup Covers Black Control Knobs Knurled Flat-Top Hardware Finish Nickel/Chrome Tuning Machines Fender® Lightweight Vintage-Style Keys with Tapered Shafts Strings Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406 Middle Pickup V-Mod II Split Single-Coil Precision Bass® Pickup Configuration S Controls Master Volume, Master Tone Switching None AM PRO II P BASS RW OWT

item.title: Yamaha Attitude Limited III Billy Sheehan Signature Bass-(2011) Black, DiMarzio Relentless Bridge Pickup w/Case Candy & Yamaha Hardshell Case USED — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Very Good · Main Street Music & Sound

Yamaha Attitude Limited III Billy Sheehan Signature Bass-(2011) Black, DiMarzio Relentless Bridge Pickup w/Case Candy & Yamaha Hardshell Case USED

The Yamaha Billy Sheehan Attitude III is a premium Japanese-made signature bass developed in collaboration with legendary bassist Billy Sheehan (Mr. Big, Talas, David Lee Roth). Designed for powerful rock performance, it combines massive low-end punch, exceptional sustain, and remarkable tonal flexibility through its unique dual-pickup and stereo/mono output system. Built at Yamaha's renowned Music Craft facility in Japan, the Attitude III reflects Sheehan's highly customized playing style, featuring a scalloped upper fingerboard, Hipshot D-Tuner, and distinctive dual-output electronics.

This Attitude Limited III is in Excellent Condition, upgraded with a DiMarzio Relentless P-Bass Bridge Pickup. Included with the sale is original hardshell case, certificate of authenticity, booklets and wrenches. The guitar has some light surface swirls in the finish-top and bottom, tarnish/wear on the bridge pickup and a few very, very light ring dings on the back of the neck, not enough to feel while playing.

Note: There is fretwear. Fretwear is as follows: E-String-frets 1-6, A-String-frets 1-11, D-String-frets 1-21, G-String-frets 1-21. Frets 4 and 7 are slightly high. 
The consigner would prefer to sell the bass with the current Billy Sheehan strings on it. They could use replacing but still plays great. Case is in great shape. 

See Photos. Please call the store if you have questions.

Key Features

  • Made in Japan (Yamaha Music Craft)
  • Billy Sheehan Signature Model
  • 34" scale length, 4-string electric bass
  • Alder body with Yamaha's spline-joint construction for enhanced resonance
  • Bolt-on maple neck with reinforced miter-bolting neck joint
  • Maple fingerboard with scalloped frets 17–21
  • 21 frets (Jumbo frets 1–16, Medium frets 17–21)
  • Yamaha-designed DiMarzio Woofer neck pickup
  • Aftermarket DiMarzio Relentless middle pickup
  • Stereo and mono output capability
  • Independent volume controls for each pickup
  • Woofer tone control with high-cut switch
  • Hipshot D-Tuner for instant Drop-D tuning
  • White pearl 3-ply pickguard
  • Gloss polyurethane body finish
  • Satin polyurethane neck finish
  • Includes original hardshell case

*NOTE: Shipping and Insurance on this item will vary depending on shipping destination. Please call the store for exact shipping cost!! West Coast may be slightly higher; East Coast may be lower than estimated shipping on our website or Reverb.com

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1970 - Sunburst — $5,650
item.description:
$5,650 · Good · Southside Guitars

This Fender Jazz Bass was made in the USA in 1970. The bass has an original sunburst over white finish that looks super cool. It shows heavy play wear, but remains a solid road warrior that plays great and sounds awesome. The finish and parts are all original except that it was refretted at some point. The truss rod was repaired at some point, but is now fully functional and the neck is straight. In the neck pocket on the back of the neck there are two extra screw holes, but we can't imagine why and they aren't visible unless the neck is removed. It weighs 8 pounds 11 ounces. This bass has been pro-setup in our store, plays great, and comes with the original case.

item.title: Ibanez SR35 5 String Fretless Bass — $444
item.description:
$444 · Very Good · Gear Emporium

Ibanez SR35 5 String Fretless bass- sounds great and plays great- kinda rare to find this one now of days— lots of life left!!

item.title: 1996 Fender Standard Precision Bass, Black — $650
item.description:
$650 · Very Good · Union Music

1996 Fender Standard Precision Bass in very good used condition. Fully functional and structurally sound, this classic mid nineties MIM bass shows honest cosmetic wear from regular use, including visible scratches, minor surface dings, and handling marks across the body that do not impact playability or structural integrity.


Crafted in Mexico during a highly regarded era for standard production instruments, this bass features a solid resonant body paired with a comfortable C shape maple neck and a smooth rosewood fretboard. It comes equipped with a single standard split coil humbucking pickup, managed by master volume and master tone controls, delivering the legendary, punchy, low end growl that has defined countless recordings across every musical genre.


A dependable, gig ready nineties player instrument that offers rock solid tuning stability, a broken in feel, and timeless P bass performance and tone.

item.title: Sterling SUB StingRay Ray4 2018 - Present - Walnut Satin — $215
item.description:
$215 · Good · Sam's Gear Emporium

The bass is overall in Good condition. It has some nicks here and there (shown in photos) but nothing that affects playability, and nothing major that would be noticeable. The main volume pot is scratchy when moving but when in place sound is totally fine and besides that everything functions as it should. The bass has a very deep and heavy tone. This particular bass also is decently hefty! Weighs about 8-9lbs. Selling because I recently swapped to a passive Jazz bass and don't use this one anymore. Message with any questions! Thanks for looking!


SN: B070403

item.title: Schecter Johnny Christ Signature Bass Satin Black B-Stock 0006 — $1,119.20
item.description:
$1,119.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter Johnny Christ Signature Bass Satin Black B-Stock 0006

The Johnny Christ Signature Bass delivers a comfortable, balanced feel across its 34" scale with a slim maple neck shaped to the 'C' profile favored by working bassists. This instrument cuts through a live mix with aggressive midrange courtesy of its EMG pickup configuration, while the satin black finish and gold bone cross inlays signal serious intent without sacrificing practicality. Built for metal and hard rock applications, it demands a player who understands active electronics and appreciates bolt-on construction reliability.

Playability & Comfort

The 21 Narrow X-Jumbo frets on an ebony fretboard with 12" radius provide fast, accurate note definition across the neck. Neck thickness measures .866" at the first fret and .925" at the 12th, creating the tapered feel essential for precision work in high-gain contexts, while the Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut at 1.653" width maintains clear articulation and stable tuning.

Tone & Electronics

The EMG MMCS bridge pickup paired with an EMG 81 neck pickup and 2-band active EQ system deliver modern, controlled aggression with responsive tone-shaping via the master volume and blend knob. An ash body with bolt-on construction combined with the Schecter Custom Bass bridge ensures articulate string definition and consistent sustain, while the Grover tuners with gold hardware maintain intonation under demanding playing conditions.

Key Features
  • Body Material: Ash with Satin Black finish
  • Neck: 3-piece Maple with 'C' shape profile
  • Fretboard: Ebony with 21 Narrow X-Jumbo frets
  • Scale: 34" (863mm)
  • Fretboard Radius: 12" (305mm)
  • Bridge Pickup: EMG MMCS
  • Neck Pickup: EMG 81
  • Controls: Master volume, blend knob, 2-band active EQ
  • Nut: Graph Tech XL Black Tusq (1.653" width)
  • Bridge: Schecter Custom Bass String Thru
  • Tuners: Grover with gold hardware
  • Inlays: Gold bone crosses with deathbat at 12th fret

This B-Stock example delivers full signature specifications and South Korean craftsmanship at a reduced price point, ideal for serious players seeking reliable active bass tone without premium retail markup.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections typical of showroom or return stock. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Acquire this premium Schecter Johnny Christ Signature instrument at a significant B-Stock discount while retaining complete manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 Fanned Fret Bass Honey Satin B-Stock 0677 — $999.20
item.description:
$999.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 Fanned Fret Bass Honey Satin B-Stock

The Stiletto Studio-5 delivers a refined five-string experience built on a neck-through platform with fanned frets that accommodate both traditional and extended-range playing techniques. The thin 'C' neck profile and moderate nut width make this bass accessible across hand sizes while maintaining the precision necessary for modern bass work. This B-stock unit offers the full specification and performance of a new instrument at a reduced price point.

Playability & Neck Design

The 34"-36" fanned fret scale provides ergonomic string angles that reduce finger strain across all five strings, while the 24 X-Jumbo frets and 16" fretboard radius support both aggressive playing and smooth legato work. A Maple/Walnut multi-ply neck offers stability and sustain across the full range, paired with a Rosewood fretboard featuring offset dot inlays for visual clarity and proven tonal characteristics.

Tone & Electronics

Dual EMG 40HZ pickups with 18-volt active circuitry and 3-band EMG EQ provide articulate, punchy tone with broad shaping capabilities across the frequency spectrum. The Master Volume/Blend control allows seamless blending between neck and bridge pickups, giving players full tonal flexibility from warm and focused to bright and aggressive.

Key Features
  • Neck-through construction with Ultra Access; Mahogany body with Bubinga top
  • 34"-36" fanned fret scale (863mm-914.4mm)
  • 24 X-Jumbo frets with 16" radius Rosewood fretboard
  • Offset dot inlays; Thin 'C' neck shape
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut; 1.771" nut width (45mm)
  • Dual EMG 40HZ pickups with 18-volt active 3-band EQ
  • Master Volume, Blend, and active tone controls
  • S-Tek bridge with Schecter tuners; Satin gold hardware
  • Metal knurled knobs with set screws
  • Right-handed configuration; Made in South Korea
  • Includes Ernie Ball 5-String Super Long .045-.130 strings

This Schecter combines fanned fret ergonomics, active tone shaping, and neck-through construction to deliver a modern five-string platform suited to contemporary bass playing across multiple genres.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections typical of B-Stock inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Acquire this premium Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 Fanned Fret 5-String at a significant B-Stock discount while enjoying the full backing of Schecter's manufacturer warranty.

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock 0275 — $959.20
item.description:
$959.20 · B-Stock · Studio Gears

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock

The Schecter C-5 GT is a five-string bass engineered for extended-range playing with a balanced, ergonomic design. Its thin "C"-shaped neck and set-neck construction deliver immediate comfort and responsiveness, while the 35" scale provides the tonal clarity and definition expected in modern bass work.

Playability & Build Quality

A 3-piece maple neck with thin "C" profile (.787" at the first fret, .866" at the 12th) connects to a mahogany body with flamed maple top via set-neck construction with ultra-access for fretboard work. The 24 extra-jumbo frets on a 16" radius ebony fretboard support aggressive playing styles and smooth bends across the extended range, while the 2-way adjustable truss rod with heel access ensures stable setup.

Tone & Electronics

A pair of EMG pickups—the EMG 40DC at the bridge and EMG 40P5 at the neck—drive a 2-band EMG EQ with volume and blend controls, delivering punchy highs and articulate low-end response. The Schecter custom bass bridge with string-thru design and Graph Tech Black Tusq XL nut maximize sustain and tonal transfer.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with flamed maple top
  • Neck: 3-piece maple, set-neck construction with ultra access
  • Fretboard: Ebony with 24 extra-jumbo frets
  • Fretboard radius: 16" (406mm)
  • Neck shape: Thin "C" profile (.787" at 1st fret, .866" at 12th fret)
  • Scale length: 35" (889mm)
  • Nut: Graph Tech Black Tusq XL, 1.771" width
  • Pickups: EMG 40DC (bridge) and EMG 40P5 (neck)
  • Electronics: Volume/Blend/2-Band EMG EQ with 9-volt clip-in battery
  • Bridge: Schecter custom bass bridge with string-thru design
  • Hardware: Black
  • Inlays: Offset/Reverse Roman numerals

This B-stock Schecter C-5 GT combines premium components with professional construction, offering serious tone and playability at a significant discount.

item.title: Used 2012 Ibanez SR1206 6-String Bass TFW3635 — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Very Good · Tone Shop Guitars

Notes: This item is located at our Fort Worth location.

Tone Shop Guitars is THE destination guitar shop in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with three locations in Addison, Southlake, and Fort Worth. Every used instrument we sell has been personally inspected by our team and is set up and ready to play. We stand behind everything we sell — stop in and play it before you buy, or reach out with any questions.

item.title: MTD Kingston Super 5 with Maple Fretboard Matte Black — $1,089
item.description:
$1,089 · Very Good · Metz Music

For sale from Metz Music is a super cool and pretty clean MTD Kingston Super-5. We performed a complete setup on this bass so it is playing at its absolute best and is ready to go when you unbox it. The matte finish is showing some finish swirl and other light marks, but there are no major dings or defects.


Ships UPS fully insured and professionally packaged.

We love to talk gear so please feel free to contact us.

At Metz Music we appreciate your patronage!

item.title: Fender Precision Bass FSR 50 Anniversary 1996 - Sunburst — $2,858.22
item.description:
$2,858.22 · Very Good · Ofertas en equipos de Alejandro

Really good condition

Original hardcase

Sounds incredible

item.title: Squier Classic Vibes 50’s P Bass 2010 - Two tone sunburst — $375
item.description:
$375 · Excellent · Bob Schmidt's Gear Emporium

Used 2010s Squier Classic Vibe ’50s Precision Bass in 2-Color Sunburst. In great condition, it delivers warm, punchy low end with a split single-coil P-Bass pickup, solid bolt-on maple neck, and comfortable 34" scale feel. The vintage-inspired body shape, smooth fretting, and dependable hardware make it a perfect choice for rock, soul, country, and more—ready to anchor any groove with confidence. Strung with flatlands, has that classic late 50s thump. Great beginner or gigging bass.

item.title: G&L Interceptor Bass 1984 - Natural (Rare) — $2,100
item.description:
$2,100 · Excellent · Forest Of Heavy

Exceptional G&L Interceptor bass, one minor ding on the backside of the body near the bottom (close up coming), very well cared for. Sounds excellent, comes in original case.
Serial number B014916

item.title: Basse Sadowsky Custom Shop commande personnalisée curly mapple NYC de 2001 — $8,098.28
item.description:
$8,098.28 · Mint · Guitares Vintages

Guitares Vintages
L'esprit du vieux son !
Vente d’instruments de musique et Atelier de lutherie

Tous nos instruments sont intégralement réglés, révisés, et garantis.


Basse Sadowsky Custom Shop curly mapple NYC de 2001:

- Commande spéciale passée à Roger Sadowsky en 2001, elle est absolument .....comme neuve.

- Standard 4cordes active

- Finition cherry sunburst

- Table en érable ondé AAA

- Corps en Frène des Marais

- 21 frettes

- Gotoh Gold Bridge; Sadowsky tuners Gold; Sadowsky pickups


Option including ( (particularités de la commande custom shop de cette basse) :

- Touche érable

- Gold Hardware

- AAA rare maple tops

- Sadowsky ultra lite hardcase


Caractéristiques du Preamp :

- Four controls in line with preamp bypass switch, wich bypasses preamp

- Preamp power by 9v battery

- Bass boost control : +13db maximum boost at 40Hz (control fully clockwise)

- Treble boost control : +13db maximum boost at 4Hz (control fully clockwise)

- Frequency Response : 5Hz to 50KHz

 -Harmonic Distortion : 0,1% at 1KHz

item.title: Rare vintage 1962 63 Epiphone Newport Bass early body shape 2 on a side tuners cherry like Gibson EB0 EB3 — $4,541.14
item.description:
$4,541.14 · Very Good · Angel Music

Here is an early Epiphone Newport Bass. It has a 63 serial number but all the 62 specs - 2 on a side tuners, different body shape w longer treble horn. These were made at the Gibson Kalamazoo factory of course and less than 300 of this body shape were shipped before the new shape and batwing headstock were introduced. There is some belt buckle on the back and the center cover is missing. Nickle parts. Light weight and plays like butter. Mudbucker sounds awsome. Non original HSC. Please view our other listings.

item.title: Vintage Gibson SB-400 Walnut / 6.9lbs!! — $1,995
item.description:
$1,995 · Good · Nick's Hand-Picked Guitars

Here's a vintage Gibson bass that doesn't come around every day. Up for sale is a 1970s Gibson SB-400 in its original Walnut finish, complete with its original era-correct Gibson hardshell case.

Introduced in the early 1970s, the SB-400 was Gibson's fresh take on an affordable American-made bass. While it carries the familiar SG-inspired silhouette, the SB-400 stands apart from the earlier EB series with its alder body, two-piece maple neck, lightweight construction, and unique single-coil pickups that deliver a clear, punchy vintage voice all their own. The combination of the translucent Walnut finish and rounded chrome hardware gives these basses a distinctly 1970s Gibson aesthetic that has become increasingly sought after.

This particular example weighs an incredibly comfortable 6.9 lbs, making it an excellent choice for long rehearsals, gigs, or studio sessions. It has recently been professionally inspected and set up by our in-house technician here at Nick's Hand-Picked Guitars and is playing beautifully. It is ready to be enjoyed the moment it arrives.

Cosmetically, this bass shows honest vintage wear throughout that reflects over 50 years of use. There are various dings, scratches, finish wear, and marks consistent with its age, but no major breaks or structural repairs were found. Rather than detract from the instrument, the natural wear gives it the unmistakable character that collectors and vintage players appreciate.

The original Gibson hardshell case is included and remains in good functional condition, providing excellent protection while completing the vintage package.

Specifications:

  • Made in USA
  • Early 1970s Gibson SB-400
  • Original Walnut Finish
  • Alder Body
  • Two-Piece Maple Neck
  • Rosewood Fingerboard
  • Dual Gibson Single-Coil Pickups
  • Original Electronics
  • Weight: 6.9 lbs
  • Original Gibson Hardshell Case Included

As always, this instrument has been thoroughly inspected, professionally set up, and is ready for its next home.

Please review all photos carefully, as they are part of the description. Feel free to reach out with any questions—we're always happy to help.

item.title: Lakland Skyline 44-02 Deluxe Bass in Three Tone Sunburst — $1,799
item.description:
$1,799 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Lakland Skyline 44-02 Deluxe Bass in Three Tone Sunburst

The Skyline 44-02 Deluxe delivers an ergonomic neck taper and balanced weight distribution that makes extended playing sessions comfortable and fatigue-free. This instrument carries the same active electronics and pickup configuration found in Lakland's USA Series, housed in a body topped with figured quilted maple and finished in classic three-tone sunburst. The combination of premium hardware, Chicago-wound pickups, and a refined preamp gives this bass the clarity and punch needed to cut through any mix without compromise.

Playability & Build

The 1.6" nut width and Lakland neck taper provide fast, comfortable fretting across the 22-fret, 34" scale fingerboard. Construction pairs an ash body with a quilted maple top, flat-sawn maple neck with graphite reinforcement, and Indian laurel fingerboard, while Hipshot Ultralite tuners and a Lakland Dual Access bridge (switchable between through-body and bridge stringing) offer both stability and versatility. The fingerboard radius of 10" and measured neck depths (.77" at the 1st fret, .87" at the 12th) create a consistent, playable profile across the entire neck.

Tone & Electronics

Active tone shaping comes courtesy of the Lakland LH3 preamp and MM-J pickup configuration, both wound in Lakland's Chicago shop and identical to USA Series specifications. Three-band EQ with cut and boost controls for bass, midrange, and treble, combined with a panning-style pickup blend and 3-way bridge coil tap, delivers articulate lows, defined mids, and present highs powered by a single 9-volt battery. The master volume includes a pull-for-bypass function to disengage the preamp entirely when you need passive operation.

Key Features
  • Body: Ash with Quilted Maple top in Three Tone Sunburst finish
  • Neck: Flat-sawn Maple with graphite reinforcement bars
  • Fingerboard: Indian Laurel with 10" radius, 22 frets
  • Scale Length: 34" with .75" bridge string spacing
  • Nut Width: 1.6" Delrin nut
  • Neck Dimensions: .77" depth at 1st fret, .87" at 12th fret, 2.46" width at final fret
  • Tuners: Hipshot Ultralites
  • Bridge: Lakland Dual Access (through-body or through-bridge stringing)
  • Pickups: Lakland MM-J configuration
  • Preamp: Lakland LH3 with bass/mid/treble cut and boost, pickup blend, 3-way coil tap, master volume with tone bypass
  • Power: Single 9-volt battery
  • Truss Rod Access: 4mm hex at neck heel

The 44-02 Deluxe combines the proven platform of Lakland's mid-level workhorse with premium tonewoods and finishing to deliver professional-grade electronics and playability at the Skyline price point.

item.title: Carvin AC50 5 String Bass — $700
item.description:
$700 · Good · Lev's Gear Garage

this very rare carvin AC50 has a very unique acoustic/electric tone and plays absolutely amazing. it did have a repair on the finish just in front of the bridge and has a couple small chips below the control knobs right on the edge. this can be seen in the second to last pic. This is why I have it posted a good bit lower than these usually go for. comes with a really nice case.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Active '70s Jazz Bass V 2025 - Ocean Turquoise — $450
item.description:
$450 · Excellent · room34

This 2025 Squier Classic Vibe Active '70s Jazz Bass V has been very lightly used. In fact, it has never left this room since it was taken out of the box! Used for a few home recordings only. It's in excellent condition and is ready to play!

item.title: Revelation RBJ-67 5-string Jazz Bass - upgraded with John East electronics — $500
item.description:
$500 · Excellent · Daddy Stoat's Bass Emporium

Here we have my Revelation RBJ67 5-string Jazz Bass.

If you're unfamiliar with them, Revelation are a UK-based company who used to be part of Hohner, run by the late, great guitar and pickup designer Alan Entwistle. They restarted Revelation as a standalone guitar brand back around 2012, and have been putting out some excellent-sounding, good value instruments ever since.

I picked up this RBJ-67 5-string Jazz back in 2014, and was very impressed with the tone out of the box - those Entwistle pickups with the huge, MM-style polepieces have some serious heft. I wanted more of that "Marcus" thing though, so I had a John East Uni-Pre professionally installed (3-band active EQ with sweepable mids), complete with a battery box. Now the thing sounds utterly monstrous! I'll put it up against a Sadowsky or any other super-J and it'll devour them. :)

It's in fantastic, almost unmarked condition and has rarely left the house. Alas, my back isn't what it once was - all that solid ash means it's a little weighty for me right now (approx 10.5lbs), so my loss can be your gain.

Will come well packaged in a gig bag.

item.title: 1980s Aria Pro II SB-R60 Bass MIJ Matsumoku Neck-Through Red – Modified Project — $600
item.description:
$600 · Fair · Lost Signal Instrument Co.

Up for sale is a vintage Aria Pro II SB-R60 in a beautiful see-through red finish. This is a Japanese-made Matsumoku-era SB bass with neck-through-body construction, a multi-piece maple/walnut neck, Japanese ash/sen-style body wings, brass nut, matching headstock, 24-fret fingerboard, and the classic Aria SB body shape.

The SB-R60 is part of the same broader Aria Pro II SB family associated with players like Cliff Burton, John Taylor, Jack Bruce, Marcus Miller, and Rudy Sarzo. This model gives you much of the classic SB look and feel: long neck-through sustain, sculpted double-cut body, brass nut, and a fast vintage Japanese neck. Similar SB-R60 examples are described as Matsumoku-built, neck-through instruments with ash wings and a brass nut.

This particular bass has been modified into a PJ-style setup. It appears to retain the original soapbar-housed P-style pickup, with an added bridge single-coil pickup and revised controls. The mod is very usable in concept, but the original P pickup currently has a string-output imbalance, so this is best for someone comfortable with pickup/electronics repair or someone who wants a strong Matsumoku SB platform for restoration or customization.

Specs:
Weight: 9.8 lbs
Nut width: 1.73"
Neck width at 12th fret: 2.16"
Neck thickness at 1st fret: 0.86"
Neck thickness at 12th fret: 0.95"
Construction: Neck-through
Neck: Maple/walnut multi-piece
Body wings: Japanese ash/sen-style wood
Nut: Brass
Controls: Modified stacked volume/tone layout with selector switch
Country: Made in Japan

This would be a great bass for someone who wants a vintage Matsumoku Aria SB without paying collector-grade prices, or for a player looking for a high-quality neck-through restoration project.

item.title: Fender Japan JB-75 Jazz Bass w/ Badass II Bridge – 3-Tone Sunburst 02-04 — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Very Good · Japanese Guitar Company

Just cleaned, restrung, and professionally set up with a comfortable low action. This bass plays exceptionally well and is ready to go.

Crafted in Japan with Q-serial Q062522, dating production to approximately 2002–2004. This is a JB-75 reissue featuring the classic vintage-inspired appointments including block inlays, bound rosewood fingerboard, ash body with beautiful 3-Tone Sunburst finish, and an upgraded Badass II bridge.

The Badass II bridge is a highly regarded aftermarket upgrade that provides increased sustain and allows for more precise intonation while preserving the classic Jazz Bass feel and tone.

Overall, the bass is in very good condition. The finish shows only light cosmetic wear from normal use, the neck is straight, and the frets have virtually no wear, leaving years of life ahead.

The electronics function exactly as they should, delivering the articulate, punchy tone that has made Japanese Fender Jazz Basses so respected among players and collectors.

The only notable flaw is a small area along the side of the body where the finish has begun to lift and feels like it may eventually chip. This has been clearly photographed so there are no surprises.

A fantastic Japanese-made Jazz Bass that is equally at home on stage, in the studio, or in a collection.

Case: N/A

Scale Length: 34“

Fret Wear: 9.9/10

Action at 12F (4th): .09“

Action at 12F (1st): .08“

Weight: 10lbs 9oz

Overall Condition: 8.2/10

Cool Factor: 11 out of 10


USA Seller, check my feedback to see how I value my customers and see my other listings for more rare Japanese Guitars and other unique gear! I use recycled packaging for reduced environmental impact and ship all items 100% insured against loss or damage.


Internal Use (Bin) - H4

item.title: Used Ibanez EHB1500-DEF Ergonomic Headless Bass - Dragon Eye Burst Flat - With Bag — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · Roxy Music

Used Ibanez EHB1500-DEF Ergonomic Headless Bass - Dragon Eye Burst Flat - With Bag

No International Shipping.

Weight: 6 lbs 10.0 oz

This Used Ibanez EHB1500-DEF Ergonomic Headless Bass is in excellent shape. The bass has been tested and is fully functional. Cosmetically the bass is very clean with minimal signs of use. The bass comes with strap locks and a gig bag.

item.title: Flight Mini Bass JB BRG Limited Edition Roasted Poplar Body Roasted Maple Neck 4-String Electric Bass Guitar w/Padded Gig Bag — $519
item.description:
$519 · Brand New · The Gator Tone

It’s time to lay down some awesome grooves with Flight’s Electric Mini Bass! The Flight Mini JB PP Bass features a solid body, metal strings, and standard bass tuning (EADG) in a compact 23” scale—ideal for gigging and traveling bass players. This model showcases a vibrant British Racing Green finish on a roasted poplar body, paired with a pearl pickguard, creating a bold and unique look.

Equipped with Alnico 5 pickups, the Mini JB Bass delivers a clear, sweet tone, perfect for pairing with your favorite effect pedals and amplifiers. As with all Flight instruments, the Mini JB Bass combines excellent quality with an affordable price. Stay out of treble and grab yours today!

Specifications:

Body

  • Body Shape: Mini JB Bass Limited.
  • Scale Length: 23".
  • Body: Roasted Poplar.
  • Color: British Racing Green.
  • String Gauges: .045-.105., 1st String: .045", 2nd String: .065", 3rd String: .085", 4th String: .105".

Neck

  • Neck: Roasted Maple.
  • Fretboard: Roasted Maple.
  • Nut: Artificial Bone.

Pickup & Electronics

  • Pickups: Alnico 5.
  • Controls: 2 Volume, 1 Tone.
  • Knobs: 3.
  • Hardware: Chrome.

Other

  • Position Markers: Offset Position Markers at 3rd, 5th, 7th, 9th, 12th, 15th, 17th & 19th Frets.
  • Includes: Deluxe Padded Gig Bag.

item.description:

It’s time to lay down some awesome grooves with Flight’s Electric Mini Bass! The Flight Mini JB PP Bass features a solid body, metal strings, and standard bass tuning (EADG) in a compact 23” scale—ideal for gigging and traveling bass players. This model showcases a vibrant British Racing Green finish on a roasted poplar body, paired with a pearl pickguard, creating a bold and unique look.

item.description:

item.title: Ibanez RGB300 Electric Bass Guitar with EMG-X Pickups & Gig Bag Used — $329.98
item.description:
$329.98 · Excellent · The Music Den

Ibanez RGB300 Electric Bass Guitar with EMG-X Pickups & Gig Bag Used

Serial: I221017809

This bass is used but in excellent condition! It may show minor cosmetic wear from normal use, including a ding on bottom left of top. Please see images for appearance. It has been inspected and set-up by our in-house techs and will be gone over again before it ships out.

Comes with Markbass gigbag.

The Ibanez RGB300 is a 4-string solidbody electric bass inspired by the iconic RG guitar design, offering a modern playing feel with a PJ pickup layout. This used model has been upgraded with EMG-X pickups, providing increased output, lower noise, and enhanced clarity compared to the factory Dynamix pickups. Fitted with tapewound strings for a smooth feel and warm vintage-inspired tone, it also includes a Markbass gig bag for transport and protection.

  • Model: Ibanez RGB300
  • Instrument Type: 4-string solidbody electric bass
  • Condition: Used
  • Body Material: Poplar
  • Neck Material: Maple (bolt-on)
  • Fingerboard Material: Jatoba with sharktooth inlays
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Number of Frets: 22 medium frets
  • Pickup Configuration: EMG-X PJ pickup set (upgraded)
  • Electronics: Ibanez Custom 2-band EQ
  • Bridge: Ibanez B10 bridge with 19mm string spacing
  • Strings: Tapewound strings installed
  • Hardware Finish: Black
  • Included Accessories: Markbass gig bag
  • Country of Manufacture: Indonesia

item.description:

Solid feeling with lots of sustain.

Easy to play with no buzzing out.

Beautiful Bass Guitar need gone because im moving to Minnesota and need gas money. Hardly played and doesn't have a scratch on her, original strings I believe and gig bag will be included, no amp cord I think​

item.title: Vintage 1988 Ibanez SR2000E Bass-Neck-Through MIJ FujiGen-Active Powercurve EQ — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Very Good · Lost Signal Instrument Co.

Up for sale is a rare 1989 Ibanez SR2000E Soundgear 4-string bass in Dark Blue, made in Japan by FujiGen during the earliest era of the Soundgear series. This is not a modern SR2000E Prestige model; this is the original short-lived late-1980s version, produced only around 1988–1989.

The SR2000E was one of the top early Soundgear models and features neck-through-body construction, hard maple body wings with an arched top, a 3-piece maple neck, a 24-fret ebony fingerboard, matching headstock, cosmo black hardware, Gotoh tuners, and the rare countersunk HB-4 bridge with 19mm string spacing. It is loaded with DiMarzio IBZ/USA C2 P/J passive pickups and Ibanez’s unusual active Powercurve EQ system.

The control layout includes master volume, pickup balancer, a 3-position selector for passive / active EQ depth settings, and a frequency selector that sweeps between different resonant EQ points. It is unique for an Ibanez, but quite similar, if not a clone of Alembic "Series II" electronics, and gives the bass a much more boutique, hi-fi character than a typical passive PJ bass. Tonally, it can cover tight neck-through rock tones, articulate fusion sounds, bright attack-heavy fingerstyle, and more sculpted Alembic-style active textures.

This example has been cleaned up, set up, restrung, and had the frets crowned and polished. It plays with comfortable low action and is ready to use. There is cosmetic wear, mainly scratches and buckle rash on the back and some wear near the bridge, but the bass is structurally sound and fully working.

Specs:
Weight: 9.6 lbs
Nut width: 1.57"
Neck width at 12th fret: 2.21"
Neck thickness at 1st fret: 0.80"
Neck thickness at 12th fret: 0.90"
Fingerboard radius: 12"
Scale: 34"
Bridge spacing: 19mm
Pickups: DiMarzio IBZ/USA C2 P/J
Controls: Volume / Balance / 3-position Powercurve switch / Frequency selector
Made in Japan by FujiGen

A great bass for collectors of vintage MIJ Ibanez instruments, early Soundgear models, neck-through basses, or players looking for something with a more boutique feel than a standard modern SR.

item.title: Ibanez GSR200 Soundgear 4-String Electric Bass Guitar Red w/ Gig Bag & RightOn! Strap — $239.99
item.description:
$239.99 · Good · The Muzic Store

Up for sale is an Ibanez GSR200 Soundgear 4-string electric bass guitar in a transparent red finish. This bass has been tested and is fully functional, offering the comfortable playability and versatile tones that have made the GSR200 one of Ibanez's most popular entry-level and intermediate basses.

The bass is in good used condition with normal signs of use, including light scratches, minor surface marks, and cosmetic wear consistent with regular playing. The neck plays comfortably, the electronics function properly, and all hardware operates as intended.

Included with the bass is a RightOn! Straps premium guitar strap made in Spain, as well as a gig bag. Please note that the gig bag has a large tear on the exterior and is included for protection and transport only.


Model: GSR200

Serial Number: I001220301

Made in Indonesia


Features:

• Ibanez GSR200 4-String Electric Bass

• Transparent Red finish

• Poplar body

• Maple bolt-on neck

• Rosewood/Jatoba fingerboard with white dot inlays

• Split-coil P-style neck pickup

• J-style bridge pickup

• Active Phat II bass boost circuit

• Chrome hardware

• RightOn! Straps premium guitar strap (Made in Spain)

• Gig bag included


Condition:

• Tested and fully functional

• Good used condition

• Light scratches and normal cosmetic wear throughout

• Electronics operate properly

• Neck is straight and comfortable to play

• Hardware shows normal signs of use

• Gig bag has a large tear and shows heavy cosmetic wear


Includes:

• Ibanez GSR200 Bass Guitar

• RightOn! Straps leather guitar strap (Made in Spain)

• Gig bag (damaged)


Please review all photos carefully for cosmetic condition and exactly what is included.

No returns.








_______________ 🎵 Welcome to The Muzic Store INC – Dobbs Ferry, New York! 🎵__________________

_____________________ Store Hours: Monday–Friday, 11 AM – 6 PM________________________________


If you ever need something extra included with your purchase, please let us know before shipping — we’re always happy to help!


Located in Dobbs Ferry, NY, The Muzic Store INC has been family-owned and operated since 1982, proudly serving Westchester County and beyond for over 43 years. We’re more than just a music shop — we’re a community of musicians, gear lovers, and industry experts who live and breathe music every day.

Buy your gear the way it was meant to be bought — from a store that’s been there through it all and has the vibe and experience to prove it.

Whether you’re just starting out or have been playing for decades, our mission is simple: 👉We Help you find the right gear that brings you the most joy in what you do.

We are authorized dealers for nearly every major brand, and we stock unique and hard-to-find items that other stores don’t. Don’t miss your chance to grab something truly legendary! 🎷🎻🎙🎺🥁🎸🎹🪕🎵

We could have never done this without YOU — our amazing customers. Thank you for supporting us for over four decades! 💕

If you have any questions about our listings or need help finding the perfect piece of gear, feel free to contact us anytime. 😁✌

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass JB-62 Lefty LH 1990-1991 Sunburst — $1,250.47
item.description:
$1,250.47 · Good · bassNguitar

Introduced in 1960, the Jazz Bass quickly established itself as the benchmark in the market. As usual, this left-handed Jazz Bass, made between 1990 and 1991, boasts the typical Japanese craftsmanship and flawless assembly. The maple neck features a rosewood fretboard. It has been modified with a preamp and active Bartolini pickups, and the bridge is a Badass II.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Ibanez GSR100EX SR Gio Bass Guitar, 4-String, Mahogany Oil — $250.23
item.description:
$250.23 · Brand New · Janzen Brothers Music Company

A guitar doesn't have to cost a lot to sound great. The GIO series was developed for players who want Ibanez quality and performance in a more affordable package. Not only do they look and play better than many other offerings in their price range, but they are held to the same standards and come with warranty is the same as Ibanez's more expensive models.

Features

Maple neck
The Maple neck provides stability and bright tonal character.

Jatoba Fretboard
Jatoba has a reddish brown color which produces a rich mid range with a crisp high end.

B10 series bridge
The B10 bridge allows fully adjustable intonation and solid tuning stability.

Technical Specifications
  • Neck Type: GSR4
  • Neck Material: Maple neck
  • Body Material: Poplar body
  • Fretboard: Jatoba fretboard
  • Inlays: White dot inlay
  • Frets: Medium frets
  • Bridge: B10 bridge
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Bridge Pickup: PPD4 bridge pickup
  • Bridge Pickup Description: Passive
  • Factory Tuning: 1G, 2D, 3A, 4E
  • String Gauge: .045/.065/.080/.100
  • Hardware Colour: Chrome
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 41mm
  • Fret Width at 22nd Fret: 62mm
  • Neck Thickness at 1st Fret: 21mm
  • Neck Thickness at 12th Fret: 22mm
  • Radius: 305mmR
GSR100EX's control diagram


With the bass held in the playing position, the knob closest to the end of the body is the tone knob, and the knob closest to the neck is the volume knob.

item.title: FENDER Custom Shop 66 Precision Bass Closet Classic RW HW PHC, 3-Color Sunburst — $4,341.66
item.description:
$4,341.66 · Brand New · Diplomate Music Center

The Fender Custom Shop 66 Precision Bass Closet Classic in 3-Color Sunburst is a Limited Edition instrument that captures the timeless look, feel, and unmistakable tone of a vintage mid-'60s Precision Bass. Its alder body is finished in thin lacquer with a tasteful Closet Classic treatment, offering the appearance of a beautifully preserved original while maintaining outstanding resonance and sustain.

The quartersawn maple neck features a comfortable '60 P-Bass Oval "C" profile, paired with a AAA rosewood fingerboard, vintage 7.25" radius, and 20 Medium Jumbo 6150 frets for a smooth, familiar playing experience. A Custom Shop Hand-Wound '65–'70 Precision Bass pickup delivers the legendary punch, warmth, and articulate low end that has defined countless recordings across every genre. Weighing 9.05 lbs, this Limited Edition Precision Bass combines authentic vintage character with exceptional Custom Shop craftsmanship and playability.

KEY SPECIFICATIONS:

Instrument Weight: 9.05 LB

MODEL NUMBER: 9231017325
SERIES: Limited Edition
COLOR: 3-Color Sunburst
ORIENTATION: Right-Hand

BODY
BODY FINISH: LAC
BODY STYLE: 59 P-Bass
BODY MATERIAL: Alder

NECK
NECK MATERIAL: Quartersawn
NECK FINISH: Medium Tint NCL
NECK SHAPE: 60 P-Bass Oval “C”
FINGERBOARD RADIUS: 7.25″ Radius
FINGERBOARD MATERIAL: AAA 9MM Rosewood
NUMBER OF FRETS: 20
FRET SIZE: Medium Jumbo 6150

ELECTRONICS
BRIDGE PICKUP: HW 65-70 P-Bass CC
MIDDLE PICKUP: None
NECK PICKUP: None

item.title: Used Ibanez SR500 Electric Bass - Brown Mahogany — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Roxy Music

Used Ibanez SR500 Electric Bass - Brown Mahogany

No International Shipping.

Weight: 6 lbs 15.0 oz

This Used Ibanez SR500 Electric Bass is in very good condition. The bass has been tested and is fully functional. Cosmetically the bass has some wear, mostly on the back side of the body. The bass comes with strap locks.
